review_text:
Thank you Jim!
Your service was exceptional.
Our stay at Blue Bay Camping and Caravan Park was breif, however memorable. Jim kindly waited for us, despite arriving very late in the evening🙏.

Facilities 💯, prime location with surrounding cafes and necessities.

Thank you again for your fabulous hospitality. Wishing you all the very best for your travels later this year.

⭐️ For anyone travelling through between now and November, I highly recommend staying here. You won’t be disappointed ⭐️

I was surprised how good this small caravan and camping park is. Very well kept, clean and orderly. And when was the last time I camped without noizy neighbours? Bathrooms very clean too. Did I mention the friendly host?
Beautiful and peaceful,  lovely  clean amenities,  and the owner is a gem....highly recommend

Wir haben spontan einen sehr schönen Stellplatz bekommen . Der Betreiber war super nett und sehr hilfsbereit . Der  Caravan Plat ist sehr klein aber schön im grünen gelegen . Ein kleiner Pool ist vorhanden,  die Toiletten und Duschen sind sehr sauber und gut gepflegt.  Der Strand ist schnell und gut zu erreichen und sehr schön .Es hat uns sehr gut gefallen .

A gem of a camping ground.  Jim found a spot for us after we were let down by another camp in the vicinity on a busy weekend. Gorgeous swimming beach. Excellent, clean facilities. Thank you Jim. You made it easy.

Absolutely loved this place. Old fashioned small camping with no bells and whistles. Spotlessly clean and so well maintained. Highly recommend this beauty. 3 min walk to the beach, for those people that can still walk.

Blue bay caravan Park is a great place beautiful grounds really clean shower and toilet facilities has a swimming pool and spa big BBQ area. 5min walk to beach etc been going there last couple years. It's a family owned park small highly recommended 👌
Beautiful peaceful location.

I’d give 10 stars if I could. Well located and chill campsite with spotlessly clean amenities. Jim is an absolute gentleman and the other guests are always friendly and respectful. This is the only place I stay when in central coast.

Lovely people - Jim and his sister made us very welcome in this gorgeous van park . . . easy access to the beach to swim and catch waves . . . amenities scrupulously clean with beautiful open air camp kitchen.
Great little campsite.  Amenities clean,  great grassy pitche. Camp kitchen has bbqs, toaster, microwave and kettle.  Short walk to the beach and a cafe just across the road. Oh and a pool!
Stayed here for one night to give the kids a break and felt so welcome! Jim was lovely, park was well kept and facilities clean. Would definitely go back 😊
A beautiful little Caravan Park and Jim was absolutely amazing with customer service in every way,we'll be back.

Such a unique and fantastic park. Very small with grounds and amenities were all immaculate. A refreshing change from the “Big 4” and “Reflections” parks taking over. Short walk to the little beach and not too far to a little group of shops for whatever you need. Greeted at the gate by the own and personally taken to our well considered site. Highly recommend.

Have stayed in many caravan parks and this one is in my top 10. Has everything. Laundry, pool, playground, bbq area/camp kitchen. Close to beach. Lovely and quiet.  Owner Jim very friendly. Well maintained and spotlessly clean.
Very friendly and very clean.

I stayed there for three nights and really enjoyed it. The owner was super friendly, the amenities were clean, and it offered a great balance of privacy without being too busy. I noticed that the owner doesn't fill up all the sites, which really helps maintain a more peaceful, private experience. It’s just a 6-minute walk to the beach. If you're staying there, I recommend trying the café on Towoon Bay Road for breakfast—the one at the entrance isn’t great.

Súper Rude women came to our site demanding us to move our tent and instead put the car which made no sense.
she told us that if we didn't like it we could leave

Don’t go there!!!!
Very clean amenities, well-manicured gardens, pristine pool, excellent location only 3 minutes walk from the beach, and lovely owners. We loved it here. Thank you :)
Idyllic little caravan park with great facilities for a young family

Wir haben kürzlich in diesem Caravanpark mit 2 Autos mit Dachzelten übernachtet. Der Preis für eine Nacht von 240$, ohne dass wir weder Strom noch Wasseranschluss gebraucht haben, erscheint uns sehr hoch. Der Park selbst ist klein und sehr beengt, mit begrenztem Bewegungsspielraum. Besonders unangenehm fanden wir, dass wir  direkt an einer Straße standen, an der Autos vorbeifuhren und Menschen vorbeigingen, was das Schlafen gar unmöglich machte, zudem gab es in diesem Bereich keinen Schatten.  Zum Strand sind es etwa 5 Minuten bergab zu Fuß. Duschen und Toiletten waren sauber allerdings ohne Privatsphäre, da die Trendwände sehr niedrig sind. Waschmaschine gegen Gebühr vorhanden. Ich würde  diesen Ort nicht empfehlen da viel zu laut und viel zu eng.

I stayed at this caravan park recently and was disappointed with the experience. The staff were quite rude and unhelpful, which really set a negative tone for the visit. The park itself is small and felt cramped, with limited space to move around. To make matters worse, we were located right next to a road, with cars driving past and people walking past, making it hard to sleep.  Unfortunately, I wouldn’t recommend this place.

Rude customer service. The owner and his wife are very grumpy and rude, small tide place near the road and lot of noise. The owner randomly invades people’s privacy and repeats what the customer has agreed to. The toilet is dirty. I mean the only good thing is not pet friendly but they’re not even human friendly.

This friendly little family owned and run park has to be the neatest and cleanest caravan park we have ever stayed at.  Loved the quiet serenity and the proximity to a small un patrolled beach that was a short walk away.  The main Entrance Beach, shopping and other great fishing spots were also just a quick drive. We highly recommend Blue Bay Camping and Caravan Park and look forward to an opportunity to return.
What a lovely small caravan park in a fabulous location. Host was so, so helpful.

Enjoyed our stay, lovely private grassy site. Very clean amenities, great camp kitchen which overlooks the  cute kids playground. The owner, Jim, was very helpful, accommodating and friendly. Highly recommend  this caravan park !!

Blue Bay was among the best parks we stayed in on our three week trip across NSW. It’s a beautiful old style park, privately owned versus one of the big chains and is within striking distance of a good beach. . The facilities are impeccable and the park is well landscaped. Seems to be a nice mix of holiday makers and long termers. The owner was  very flexible  with booking ( we were very last minute).
Great caravan park

Really nice small neat clean park
Owner very friendly

A great little caravan park, very friendly park management. Nicely grassed,  older ammenities but very good and clean.  Limited spots for bigger vans and you can feel a bit limited in space if its busy. Good to be away from the big caravan parks and busy tourist strips in the area. It has a nice pool (marginally heated) and play area but you would probably be better off at a bigger park with more space to keep kids entertained. Short walk to a nice beach. A very comfortable laid back feeling in general, a bit like a small regional caravan park. Only seemed to be 1 small functioning camp BBQ that at times you had to wait to use.

From the first interaction over the phone with  the owner Jim i just knew it was going to be a great first camping trip. He reassured us that we’d love it. We did!!! Such a beautiful tranquil environment close to all amenities. The toilets and bbq areas were  impeccable. The pool and spa were crystal clear and so warm.  The weather was definitely not on our side but to say we loved it speaks volumes of the environment and the friendliness of the staff and patrons alike.

Just spent time at blue Bay camping and caravan park. Can’t tell you how friendly the owners are. How clean the park is the lawns are mowed practically daily, wake up to the the singing of birds it is absolutely beautiful. The surround tranquility of the park. The amenities the toilets are cleaner than the Ritz Carlton, the barbecue area is amazing. They have a laundry and also they have a fridge. If you want to use it a microwave and a toaster. I highly recommend blue Bay camping and Caravan Park to anybody that wants to take their caravan and have a vacation. We will be re-booking and we will be coming back soon. Love this park. Thank you to Jim the owner and even the cleaners are so nice too…
Beautiful  sweet  clean amazing for kids

Really nicely maintained, family friendly and quiet. Owners were very accommodating of our large group.
All sites have grass (and not mud), power and water, the female bathroom has a little shallow bath for babies/kids, the playground was perfect for the kids. Toilet and facilities were all very clean.
Pool and spa was “solar” heated so was a bit cold for the smaller kids.
Beach and some cafes less than 10 minute walk away.
We would definitely stay here again if holidaying in the area.

Quelle chance d’avoir séjourné au Blue Bay Caravan Park !
Si vous souhaitez vous arrêter lors d’un court ou long séjour sur la Central Coast, nous vous recommandons cet endroit merveilleux, soigné, calme et à deux pas de la plage.
Le propriétaire Jim sera vous accueillir de la meilleure des façons et sera toujours à l’écoute de vos besoins.
De la piscine en passant par les sanitaires jusqu’à l’espace cuisine, tout est très bien entretenu.
Si vous avez des enfants, le parc à jeux est parfait et sécurisé.
Comme vous l’aurez compris, si vous êtes de passage dans la région c’est ici que vous devez poser vos bagages.

Merci beaucoup Jim pour votre accueil et votre gentillesse, nous vous en serons toujours reconnaissants !
À bientôt !
Juliette et Téo

Schöner kleiner Campingplatz, der nah am Strand gelegen ist. Der Besitzer ist super nett und sehr hilfsbereit!
Pool, Campkitchen und Waschraum vorhanden. Toiletten und Duschen waren immer sauber.
Sehr empfehlenswert!

Honestly nicest camp site we’ve stayed on during our east coast road trip, super clean facilities and really friendly atmosphere and right next to beach! on top of this the staff are amazing and cannot help enough, Jim was beyond helpful and super friendly, cannot recommend enough we will definitely be back

We have been traveling for 16 months & I can honestly say, Jim who made our booking was the friendliest most polite person to deal with, I had made this booking over the phone & was meant to book blue lagoon not Blue Bay which we were meeting up with friends, it was a 9 night stay & with no hesitation Jim cancelled my booking & transferred my money back, what a legend!

Really good small campsite! Close to a beautiful beach (less than 10mins by foot), all equipped with a camp kitchen, laundry and a clean pool. The amenities are very clean and good as well and the owner is a very friendly man, always happy to have a chat or help you out if there are any problems.
Really nice small campground! Really friendly atmosphere, really clean and just a 3 minute walk to the beach :)

We cannot fault this park. Large grassy sites that we were shown to. It’s the place you might have gone when you were a kid. We got the warmest welcome from Tracey and Jim plus Jim loaned us a drill to make some repairs. Meticulously maintained and very clean. Loved that things have been looked after and fixed rather than replaced. Had the loveliest swim and it couldn’t be more perfect for our toddlers. It is also so quiet and peaceful that we felt bad about any noise we made. Wish we had time to stay much longer and hope it’s here when we come back!

This park is with out a doubt the nicest park that we have stayed in during our years of travelling
You are Welcomed to the Park and shown to your site which doesn’t happen in the big parks
The amenities are spotless, it has a great camp kitchen, pool & children’s play area
Management are very friendly & go out of their way to make sure that your stay is enjoyable & memorable
If there was a 10 star rating it would be worth it
We will be back when ever we pass through the Central Coast

Honestly the sweetest little caravan park I’ve ever stayed at. Welcomed into the office which is more like walking into their loungeroom, guided to my spot and showed around, retro style meticulously maintained tables and chairs and chunky timber camp kitchen overlooking the lush garden, kids swings etc and absolutely spotless loos and showers. The walk to the beach is about 5 minutes through the multimillion dollar properties of the area, just beautiful. Will definitely be stopping here again. Thanks for providing such a lovely park at a reasonable price.
Great customer service, extremely clean facilities and everything you could need
Great location clean quite drive in drive out sites. Very clean ammenities,really enjoyed our stay here thanks Jim
